name: Service Manifest Loader
description: Reads and parses baton-service.yaml files from service directories, converting them into ServiceManifest objects with dependency specifications.

types.name: Path
types.description: pathlib.Path type for file system paths

types.name: ServiceManifest
types.description: Imported from baton.schemas - represents a parsed service manifest

types.name: DependencySpec
types.description: Imported from baton.schemas - represents a service dependency

functions.name: load_manifest
functions.description: Load a ServiceManifest from baton-service.yaml in the given directory. Opens and reads the YAML file, validates it's not empty, and parses it into a ServiceManifest object.

inputs.name: service_dir
inputs.description: Directory path containing the baton-service.yaml file

error_cases.name: manifest_not_found
error_cases.condition: baton-service.yaml file does not exist in service_dir

error_cases.name: empty_manifest
error_cases.condition: YAML file is empty or yaml.safe_load returns None

error_cases.name: yaml_parse_error
error_cases.condition: YAML file contains invalid YAML syntax

error_cases.name: io_error
error_cases.condition: File cannot be opened or read due to permissions or other IO issues

preconditions: service_dir must be a valid directory path
baton-service.yaml file must exist in service_dir
postconditions: File has been read and closed
side_effects: Reads file from disk at path {service_dir}/baton-service.yaml

structured_side_effects.description: Opens and reads the manifest YAML file

functions.name: _parse_manifest
functions.description: Parse raw YAML dict into ServiceManifest. Processes dependencies (converting strings and dicts to DependencySpec objects) and constructs a ServiceManifest with all fields, using defaults for missing values.

inputs.name: raw
inputs.description: Raw dictionary loaded from YAML file

error_cases.name: missing_name
error_cases.condition: raw dict does not contain 'name' key

error_cases.name: invalid_dependency_spec
error_cases.condition: DependencySpec constructor fails due to invalid parameters

error_cases.name: invalid_service_manifest
error_cases.condition: ServiceManifest constructor fails due to invalid parameters

postconditions: Returns a ServiceManifest with all required and optional fields populated
Dependencies are converted to DependencySpec objects
Default values are applied for missing optional fields

invariants: Default version is '0.0.0' if not specified
Default port is 0 if not specified
Default proxy_mode is 'http' if not specified
Default role is 'service' if not specified
Empty strings are used as defaults for api_spec, mock_spec, and command
Empty dict is used as default for metadata
Dependencies can be specified as strings or dicts in YAML
